{
  "test_files": {
    "test_gtm_tom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.c": "/* AUTOGENERATED UNITY TESTS FOR GTM_TOM_3_PHASE_INVERTER_PWM */\n\n#include \"unity.h\"\n#include \"mock_gtm_tom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.h\"\n#include \"gtm_tom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.h\"\n\n/* UT macros matching configuration values */\n#define UT_FLOAT_EPSILON               (1e-4f)\n#define UT_INIT_DUTY_U_PERCENT        (25.0f)\n#define UT_INIT_DUTY_V_PERCENT        (50.0f)\n#define UT_INIT_DUTY_W_PERCENT        (75.0f)\n#define UT_STEP_PERCENT               (10.0f)\n#define UT_PWM_FREQ_HZ                (20000.0f)\n#define UT_NUM_CHANNELS               (3u)\n\n/* Production functions may be static in the .c; tests call them via extern declarations\n   as required by the test harness rules. */\nextern void configurePwmChannels(uint8_t channelCount);\nextern void updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(void);\n\nvoid setUp(void) {\n    mock_gtm_tom_3_phase_inverter_pwm_reset();\n}\n\nvoid tearDown(void) {}\n\n/* Group 1 - configurePwmChannels: initialization / enable guard */\n\nvoid test_TC1_001_init_when_gtm_disabled_calls_enable_and_clocks(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange: peripheral appears disabled so driver must enable and configure CMU */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 0; /* false */\n\n    /* Act */\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    /* Assert: initConfig and init called exactly once */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig should be called once during init sequence\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called once during init sequence\");\n\n    /* Assert: enable & CMU calls invoked when GTM initially disabled */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_isEnabled should be called once to check GTM state\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_enable_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_enable should be called when GTM is disabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency should be called when enabling GTM\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency should be called when configuring CMU\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency should be called when configuring CMU\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks should be called when configuring CMU\");\n\n    /* Assert: initial runtime duty update and LED pin configuration performed */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(), \"Initial duty update should be called once after PWM init\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_getCallCount(), \"LED pin(s) should be configured as output after init\");\n\n    /* Assert: init() spy shows the correct PWM configuration values (user-set values asserted on init spy per rules) */\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_PWM_FREQ_HZ, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_lastFrequency, \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called with the configured PWM frequency\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE((uint32_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS, (uint32_t)mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_lastNumChannels, \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called with the correct number of logical channels\");\n}\n\nvoid test_TC1_002_init_when_gtm_already_enabled_skips_enable_and_clocks(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange: peripheral already enabled */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 1; /* true */\n\n    /* Act */\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    /* Assert: initConfig and init still called once */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig should be called once even when GTM is enabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called once during init sequence\");\n\n    /* Assert: enable/CMU should NOT be called because GTM was already enabled */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_isEnabled should be called once to check GTM state\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(0u, mock_IfxGtm_enable_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_enable should NOT be called when GTM is already enabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(0u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency should NOT be called when GTM is already enabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(0u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency should NOT be called when GTM is already enabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(0u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency should NOT be called when GTM is already enabled\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(0u, mock_IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks should NOT be called when GTM is already enabled\");\n\n    /* Assert: initial runtime update and LED configuration still occur */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(), \"Initial duty update should be called once after PWM init\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_getCallCount(), \"LED pin(s) should be configured as output after init\");\n}\n\n/* Group 2 - configurePwmChannels: configuration values */\n\nvoid test_TC2_001_initial_duties_are_stored_and_passed_to_hal(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 1; /* assume GTM already enabled for simplicity */\n\n    /* Act */\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    /* Assert: the driver update was called once and the last duties reflect the configured initial percentages */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(), \"Initial duty update should be called once\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_U_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[0], \"Initial U duty should be 25% and passed to HAL as percent\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_V_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[1], \"Initial V duty should be 50% and passed to HAL as percent\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_W_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[2], \"Initial W duty should be 75% and passed to HAL as percent\");\n\n    /* Assert: correct number of channels captured by init spy */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE((uint32_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS, (uint32_t)mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_lastNumChannels, \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called with 3 logical channels for 3-phase PWM\");\n}\n\nvoid test_TC2_002_init_frequency_matches_pwm_requirement_and_initConfig_called_first(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 1;\n\n    /* Act */\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    /* Assert: initConfig was called (SDK defaults were populated) and init called (application values captured)\n       Per rules: application-set frequency must be asserted on init spy (not initConfig spy) */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig should be called to populate defaults before application sets fields\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_getCallCount(), \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called to apply configured values\");\n\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_PWM_FREQ_HZ, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_init_lastFrequency, \"IfxGtm_Pwm_init should be called with user-configured PWM frequency (20 kHz)\");\n}\n\n/* Group 3 - configurePwmChannels: runtime update logic */\n\nvoid test_TC3_001_single_update_increments_each_channel_and_calls_hal_once_per_update(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange: initialize module state first */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 1;\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    uint32_t before = mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount();\n\n    /* Act: perform one runtime update (should increment each duty by UT_STEP_PERCENT) */\n    updateGtmTom3phInvDuty();\n\n    /* Assert: HAL update called exactly once more */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(before + 1u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(), \"updateGtmTom3phInvDuty should call HAL update exactly once per invocation\");\n\n    /* Assert: duties incremented by UT_STEP_PERCENT */\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_U_PERCENT + UT_STEP_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[0], \"U duty should increase by step percent on single update\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_V_PERCENT + UT_STEP_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[1], \"V duty should increase by step percent on single update\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, UT_INIT_DUTY_W_PERCENT + UT_STEP_PERCENT, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[2], \"W duty should increase by step percent on single update\");\n}\n\nvoid test_TC3_002_multiple_updates_wraps_channel_independently_when_exceeding_100_percent(void)\n{\n    /* Arrange: initialize module state */\n    mock_IfxGtm_isEnabled_returnValue = 1;\n    configurePwmChannels((uint8_t)UT_NUM_CHANNELS);\n\n    uint32_t before = mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount();\n\n    /* Act: call update 3 times\n       Starting from [25,50,75]\n       After 1: [35,60,85]\n       After 2: [45,70,95]\n       After 3: [55,80,  (95+10)>=100 => wrap => 10 ] => [55,80,10]\n    */\n    updateGtmTom3phInvDuty();\n    updateGtmTom3phInvDuty();\n    updateGtmTom3phInvDuty();\n\n    /* Assert: HAL update invoked three more times */\n    TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_UINT32_MESSAGE(before + 3u, mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(), \"Three update calls should result in three HAL update invocations\");\n\n    /* Assert: resulting duties after 3 updates */\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, (UT_INIT_DUTY_U_PERCENT + 3.0f * UT_STEP_PERCENT), mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[0], \"U duty should be incremented by 30% after 3 updates\");\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, (UT_INIT_DUTY_V_PERCENT + 3.0f * UT_STEP_PERCENT), mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[1], \"V duty should be incremented by 30% after 3 updates\");\n    /* W wraps: expected final is 10% per wrap semantics described in requirements */\n    TEST_ASSERT_FLOAT_WITHIN_MESSAGE(UT_FLOAT_EPSILON, (UT_STEP_PERCENT), mock_IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[2], \"W duty should wrap and equal step percent after exceeding 100% (wrap semantics)\");\n}\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    UNITY_BEGIN();\n\n    /* Group 1 */\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC1_001_init_when_gtm_disabled_calls_enable_and_clocks);\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC1_002_init_when_gtm_already_enabled_skips_enable_and_clocks);\n\n    /* Group 2 */\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC2_001_initial_duties_are_stored_and_passed_to_hal);\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC2_002_init_frequency_matches_pwm_requirement_and_initConfig_called_first);\n\n    /* Group 3 */\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC3_001_single_update_increments_each_channel_and_calls_hal_once_per_update);\n    RUN_TEST(test_TC3_002_multiple_updates_wraps_channel_independently_when_exceeding_100_percent);\n\n    return UNITY_END();\n}\n"
  }
}
